_meta.source: UCSB 2024-2025 official major sheets and department websites
_meta.note: Prerequisites are direct prerequisites only (not transitive). prereqText is the raw catalog text for reference.

preMajor.name: Pre-Major
preMajor.description: Min 2.85 UC GPA, no grade below C

preparationForMajor.name: Preparation for the Major
preparationForMajor.description: Grade of C or better required; not counted in pre-major GPA

lowerDivMajorPrep.name: Lower-Division Major Preparation
lowerDivMajorPrep.description: All required. Grade of C or better to take courses for which these are prerequisites.

courses.name: Probability and Statistics

courses.name: Data Structures and Algorithms I
courses.prereqText: CMPSC 40 or MATH 8 with grade of C or better; CMPSC 24 or CMPSC 9; PSTAT 120A or ECE 139 (may be concurrent).

upperDivElectives.description: 28-32 units of approved upper-division CS or related courses
